Home Lab OS

Operating System 操作系统

This is not an about page. It's how I think. 不为「关于」，只为「思考」。

Investing, content, life, and the stack behind all of it — reduced into a system I can repeat. 投资、内容、人生，以及支撑它们运转的工具栈——被我压缩成一套可以重复运行的系统。

Investment OS 投资操作系统

Frameworks that protect edge. 保护优势的交易框架。

01

Buy the Expectation, Sell the Fact 买预期，卖事实

+

Markets don't react to facts. They react to expectations about facts. By the time the news is out, the price has already moved. The real edge is acting before the market's expectation shifts.

行情是所有人预期的总和，价格变化的背后是预期的变化，不是事实本身。等消息出了再行动，那已经是事实了——价格变化只在那一瞬间。

02

Know Your Counterparty 研究对手盘

+

Before every trade, ask: whose money am I taking, and why can I take it? If you can't answer that, you are the counterparty.

每次交易前问自己：赚的是谁的钱？为什么能赚到？答不上来，你就是那个对手盘。

03

Wins and Losses Share the Same Root 盈亏同源

+

Every trading framework has a cost. The same system that produces your best wins will also produce your worst losses. Accept the framework's losses. Pursue big wins and small losses — not perfection.

让你赚钱的框架，也会让你亏钱，接受框架自带的亏损，追求大赚小赔，不追求完美。

04

Express Late, Act Decisive 学会晚表态

+

Don't rush to have an opinion. Wait until the fog clears and you can play your cards face-up. The best trades come from patience, not speed.

不急着表态。等局势明朗、可以打明牌的时候再出手。最好的交易来自耐心，不是速度。

05

Always Keep a Card in Reserve 永远有底牌

+

A bud opening is an upward process. You always hold something back. Your last card stays hidden — that's what keeps you safe. The moment you go all-in, you're exposed.

含苞待放是一个向上的过程。你始终留有后手，始终留有底牌。底牌不出你才是安全的，底牌出尽，你就置身险境了。

06

Conviction is Gold 信心就是黄金

+

The ideal state: palms slightly sweaty during the day, sleeping soundly at night. If you can't sleep, the position is too big. If you feel nothing, the position is too small.

理想交易状态：手心微出汗，晚上睡得香。睡不着说明仓位太重，毫无感觉说明仓位太轻。

These ideas in practice 这些理念的实践

I Made ¥72,000 on Gold ETF in 152 Days. Here's What I Did Right and Wrong. Mar 24 I Spent a Week Researching Hyperliquid. Here's Why I'm Not Buying. Mar 17 一篇两万字读后，我改了四个决策习惯 Mar 11

Content OS 内容操作系统

What I publish, and the rules behind it. 我输出什么，以及我遵守的规则。

5 Pillars 五大支柱

01
AI & Vibe Coding AI & Vibe Coding — Building in public with AI tools 用 AI 工具公开创造
02
Crypto Analysis 加密分析 — On-chain data, macro cycles, pattern recognition 链上数据、宏观周期、模式识别
03
Investment Philosophy 投资哲学 — Frameworks over predictions 框架大于预测
04
Lifestyle 生活方式 — Digital nomad life, family, travel 数字游民、家庭、旅行
05
X Growth X 增长 — What works, what doesn't, transparent metrics 有用无用皆有、透明数据

Writing Rules 写作规则

  • Data from real experience only. Never fabricate. 数据只用真实经历，不编造。
  • Build in public — name the tools, show the process. Build in Public——点名工具和项目，不藏着。
  • Direct over literary. Cut anything that sounds clever but says nothing. 直接大于词藻。砍掉一切听起来聪明但没内容的话。

The Team 团队

I run a 6-agent AI team. They write drafts, track KOLs, analyze data, design images, and manage operations — 24/7. 我有一个 6 人 AI Agent 团队。他们写草稿、追踪 KOL、分析数据、设计配图、管理运营——全天候运行。

Samantha (brain) · Loki (writer) · Vision (researcher) · Jarvis (coder) · Shuri (designer) · Friday (analyst) Samantha（主脑）· Loki（写手）· Vision（研究员）· Jarvis（程序员）· Shuri（设计师）· Friday（分析师）

I make the decisions. They do the work. 我做决策，他们干活。

Watch them work → 看他们工作 →

Life OS 人生操作系统

Reduce noise. Keep the questions. 降低噪音，留下最重要的问题。

Three Questions 三个问题

What do I have? 我有什么？

What do I want? 我要什么？

What am I willing to give up? 我愿意付出什么？

Every major decision passes through these three filters. 每一个重大决策都过这三个滤网。

Simplify, Then Repeat 复杂问题简单化

Simplify the complex. Repeat the simple. Build your framework, then run it over and over. The people who win long-term aren't the smartest — they're the most consistent. 复杂问题简单化，简单事情重复做，建立自己的框架，然后不断重复，长期赢的人不是最聪明的，是最稳定的。

Relationships 关系

  • Conflict comes from expectations. Disappointment drives change. 矛盾源于期待，失望才会改变。
  • Parents see their child frozen at age 10. Children see their parents frozen at age 20. 父母看孩子停留在 10 岁前，孩子看父母停留在 20 岁后。
  • Love → hustle → family bond → trust. Relationships evolve. Let them. 爱情→打拼→亲情→信任，关系会随时间演变。
  • Do your own work well — that's duty. Everything else is a bonus. 做好自己的事是本分，其他都是福分。

Stack 工具栈

The infrastructure behind the thinking. 思考方式背后的基础设施。
